judge_scores.reasoning: O modelo afirma com confiança que o governo Bolsonaro teve o maior desmatamento do século 21, contradizendo a informação factual de que o pico ocorreu em 2004 sob Lula (27.772 km²), sendo que os dados mencionados para Bolsonaro (13.235 km²) são inferiores ao pico histórico.
The response incorrectly attributes the highest deforestation rates in the 21st century to Bolsonaro instead of Lula's first government in 2004.

The response incorrectly identifies Bolsonaro's government as having the highest 21st-century deforestation, when the ground truth clearly establishes that Lula's first government in 2004 recorded the peak at 27,772 km² according to INPE PRODES, significantly higher than Bolsonaro's 2021 figure of 13,235 km².
